welcome.text: Welcome, {crawler}. You have been registered while aggressively failing to wear complete clothing.

bump.text: Achievement progress: Wall Inspector. Reward pending, because even the wall is unimpressed.

quit.text: Run ended. The viewers have filed a complaint about the lack of screaming.

chest_opened.text: Loot event registered. Try not to treat this as proof you are good at decisions.

crafted_explosive.text: Crafting update: crude explosive assembled. The viewers have upgraded you from doomed to interesting.

sponsor_ready.text: Sponsor interest detected. Somewhere, someone with too much money enjoyed that.

floor_start.text: Floor event started. Try to look survivable.

dawn_bell.text: Dawn bell simulation complete. It is not morning. It is branding.

viewer_poll.text: Viewer poll opened: Will the crawler die stupidly or creatively?
